current_milestone: Phase I complete — persistence (JSONL + DuckDB), pre-believe policy hook, compliance mapping, install/deploy/runbook docs, Dockerfile + compose, hackathon pitch. 178/178 tests green, 12/12 gates still PASS.
notes: Phase I adds real ship-readiness to the substrate. Persistence is dual-backend: JSONL (pure Node, synchronously durable, zero native deps) + DuckDB (opt-in via WEAVORY_STORE=duckdb, WAL-backed, optional native binding). Binary-risk is architecturally solved: @duckdb/node-api is an optionalDependencies, persist_duckdb uses dynamic import, and openPersistentStore transparently falls back to JSONL on any load failure. Pre-believe policy hook (src/engine/policy.ts) loads JSON allow/deny rules from WEAVORY_POLICY_FILE and evaluates before sign/store. Five new operator docs (COMPLIANCE, INSTALL, DEPLOYMENT, RUNBOOK, HACKATHON_PITCH). Multi-stage Dockerfile + compose reference. All 12 existing gates (1-7 + commons/wall/gauntlet/bazaar/throne) still pass locally. Tests grew from 127 → 178 (17 JSONL unit + 9 DuckDB unit + 22 policy unit + 3 integration).
